responsibilities.entry: Implement MCP tools, resources, prompts and client feature integrations using official MCP documentation.
Separate protocol plumbing from ResearchOps business logic.
Define schemas, validation, errors, cancellation and progress behaviour.
Record capability negotiation and unsupported feature paths.

constraints.entry: Do not invent MCP protocol behaviour.
Do not expose credentials, tokens or unrestricted filesystem roots through MCP.
Do not execute side-effecting tools without explicit consent controls.
